raw_text: When vehicle is moving (S_VEHICLE_SPEED is greater than 3kph) and both vehicle speed signals are valid, EPS shall calculate the torque demand and limit it to 2Nm.

parsed_conditions.mention: vehicle is moving (S_VEHICLE_SPEED is greater than 3kph)
both vehicle speed signals are valid

raw_text: If vehicle speed is in range of 50kph and 100kph (50kph <= S_VEHICLE_SPEED <= 100kph), EPS shall reduce the assist torque with increasing Driver Torque.
When |{Column Torque}| is greater than 5Nm and one of the vehicle speed signals is valid, EPS shall raise the fault DEM_COLUMN_TORQUE_IMPLAUSIBLE and set the MIL on.

parsed_conditions.mention: one of the vehicle speed signals is valid

raw_text: If DEM_COLUMN_TORQUE_IMPLAUSIBLE is Active and S_VEHICLE_SPEED is less than 10kph, EPS shall transition from Normal state to Degraded state.

parsed_actions.mention: transition from Normal state to Degraded state

raw_text: When both vehicle speed signals are valid again and DEM_VEHICLE_SPEED_INVALID is Inactive, EPS shall return from Degraded state to Normal state and clear the MIL.

parsed_conditions.mention: both vehicle speed signals are valid again

parsed_actions.mention: return from Degraded state to Normal state
